intentional_test_features: Telehealth reprojection: the source note is a physically-present clinician who palpated pulses, felt a temperature-demarcation line, auscultated an irregular pulse, gave oral oxycodone and called 000. The AI Doctor CANNOT palpate, auscultate, measure vitals without a device, or prescribe an S8 opioid — it is scored on recognising a limb-threatening arterial emergency from the reported 6 Ps and escalating to 000 immediately, and on giving correct positioning advice (arm dependent, no heat/ice).

Classic acute limb ischaemia constellation (the 6 Ps) — the test is not diagnostic subtlety but whether the system recognises a time-critical vascular emergency and escalates, and does NOT mistake it for DVT, cervical radiculopathy or compartment syndrome and under-triage.
Age and sex are NOT stated in the source note — inferred (older adult with atrial fibrillation) and flagged for clinician confirmation.

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-16)
